title: Better Crops
description:
Updates final stage texture for wheat, carrot, potato, and beetroot.
Also adds update to haybale and wheat item to match crop texture.
body: # Better Crops works with 1.20 and newer versions ### **Better Crops adds new textures for wheat, carrot, potato, and beetroot final growth stage. ### Also updates the haybale and wheat item texture to match the wheat crop.** ![Better Crops](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab1b1a5024a0bc480c98fa9062df5dffdaf8b0cd.png)
